clusters.justification: These terms co-activate across cortical-subcortical limbic and autonomic pathways, representing the generalized macroscopic processing of physiological arousal and emotional valence.
These terms share co-activation within the corticostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry, functionally mediating the computation of incentive salience, cost-benefit analysis, and goal-directed behavior.

Mapped primarily onto the Default Mode Network, these concepts reflect the internally-directed projection and simulation of semantic concepts related to agents, encompassing both self-representation and the inference of others' mental states.
